title: Evangelion DVDs Region 2
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion DVD's (Region 2)             Quote Post by lillyrei » Sat Jul 14, 2012 11:27 am I watched the TV series some years ago using LoveFilm and now want to buy it for myself, though it would appear that might be nion impossible. I need it R2 as I'm in the UK and can't find it anywhere for less than 'silly money' on eBay or Amazon. Anybody know where I can buy it or shall I start saving up now?

[]: Re: Evangelion DVD's (Region 2)             Quote Post by svenge » Sat Jul 14, 2012 2:37 pm lillyrei wrote: I watched the TV series some years ago using LoveFilm and now want to buy it for myself, though it would appear that might be nion impossible. I need it R2 as I'm in the UK and can't find it anywhere for less than 'silly money' on eBay or Amazon. Anybody know where I can buy it or shall I start saving up now?

[]:             Quote Post by lillyrei » Sun Jul 15, 2012 2:43 am Many thanks. I have just purchased the Region 1 Platinum Collection from Amazon with a view to finding a reasonably priced region free DVD player.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jul 15, 2012 3:16 am lillyrei wrote: finding a reasonably priced region free DVD player.
